prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Shadowrun Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Draw an entire cyberpunk urban-fantasy world made of many irregular island chains and scattered landmasses, unevenly distributed across the page, as a dark neon Matrix-overlay atlas. The islands must vary strongly in size and shape: broad megacorp sprawl islands, crescent barrens islands, tiny data-haven reef specks, long arcology ridge islands, awakened forest islands, toxic industrial atolls, desert solar-grid islands, alpine corporate retreat islands, smuggler dock chains, dragon-owned finance islands, arcane black-site rocks, and abandoned offshore arcologies. Include multiple climates and biomes across the archipelago: hyperurban megasprawls, polluted coasts, awakened rainforests, desert tech zones, alpine retreats, flooded lowlands, toxic marshes, frozen data-center tundra, volcanic geothermal fields, storm harbors, and magical mana storm regions. Coastlines on every major island should be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, shoals, and hidden coves. Make the island distribution asymmetrical and natural, with dense corporate clusters in some regions and wide black-water smuggling seas elsewhere. Large detailed atlas, neon cyan/magenta highlights, subtle hexagonal Matrix overlay allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
